app.title: Re⏪ K🧠  π🌀 Tú🫵 L@🗣️ — Offline PWA

export.headerHint: Set up the document header with the entity name and, if you want, a logo.
export.headerNamePh: E.g.: Globalogistics, COCOLAB Committee, General Management…
export.footerHint: Tip: this text is added at the end of the minutes (useful for entity, department, confidentiality, etc.).
export.colorsHint: These colors are applied to the exported PDF and the copy for Gmail.

setup.title: Setup
setup.lead: Define the base details and generate the minutes structure.

empty.title: Start by creating the meeting
empty.body: Add participants and click “Generate structure”. Then you can dictate contributions, extract key points, assign tasks and export.

contrib.title: Meeting contributions
contrib.lead: Each contribution is tagged by participant and supports nested replies (thread style).
contrib.author: Author
contrib.emptyThreads: There are no contributions yet. Add the first one above or dictate one with 🎙️.

dictation.whisperHelp: Press once to record. Press again to transcribe the recording.
dictation.browserHelp: Press once to start dictation. Press again to stop dictation.

transcription.modeHintWhisper: Maximum privacy: audio and text are processed locally after downloading the model.
transcription.modeHintBrowser: Faster startup: uses the browser's speech engine and may depend on platform or browser services.
transcription.title: Offline transcriber · Whisper Small
transcription.lead: Download the model once and then dictate offline.
transcription.statusRecording: Recording audio… press again to finish.
transcription.errModelMissing: Download Whisper Small first from Settings.
transcription.errUnsupported: This browser does not support offline local transcription.
transcription.errLibrary: Could not load the local transcription engine.

keypoints.title: Key points
keypoints.lead: Extract points from contributions (including replies) with deduplication.
keypoints.empty: There are no key points yet. Click “Extract”.

tasks.title: Tasks and timelines
tasks.lead: Assign tasks by participant with target date.
tasks.hint: Tip: toggle status with ✓ and switch back with ↩︎.
tasks.empty: There are no tasks yet. Add one above.

observations.title: Observations
observations.lead: Record setbacks, meeting atmosphere, risks, incidents, or any relevant note.
observations.ph: Write down incidents, blockers, overall atmosphere, dependencies, tacit agreements, or any relevant aspect here…
observations.hint: These notes will appear at the end of the exported minutes.

timeline.title: Timeline by participant
timeline.empty: When you add tasks, the timeline by person will appear here.

print.footer: Generated with OptimeFlow(s) · Re⏪ K🧠  π🌀 Tú🫵 L@🗣️

alerts.needParticipants: Add at least 1 participant to continue.
alerts.needTextField: Select a text field for dictation.
alerts.voiceNotAvail: Dictation is not available in this browser.
alerts.voiceNetwork: Browser dictation needs a network connection on this device.
alerts.voiceGenericError: Could not complete dictation. Try again.
alerts.noThreadsForKeypoints: Add contributions first to extract key points.
alerts.needGenerateFirst: First generate the structure (Setup → Generate structure).
alerts.clearConfirm: Are you sure you want to clear all data? This cannot be undone.
alerts.deleteContribConfirm: Delete this contribution and all its replies?
alerts.copyNotSupported: Could not copy automatically in this browser. Try another one (Chrome/Edge) or copy the plain text.
alerts.logoTooBig: The logo is too large. Use a lighter image (ideally < 900KB).
alerts.logoReadFail: Could not read the logo. Try another file.

privacy.title: The app's actual privacy
privacy.body:
Summary. This application is designed to run the main work in your browser. According to the reviewed code, the contents of the minutes are not sent to the application's own backend.

What is stored locally in your browser

  • The title, date, meeting type, participants, contributions, tasks, key points and observations.
  • Preferences such as language, theme, transcription engine and export settings.
  • If you upload a logo for the PDF, that file may also be stored locally as part of the export settings.

What is not shared by default

The reviewed code does not show its own API or an upload of the minutes content to the application's servers. There is also no indication of first-party analytics for the content you type or dictate.

Transcription depending on the selected mode

Whisper offline. Audio is captured in the browser and processed locally on the device with the downloaded model. Once the runtime and model are downloaded, transcription works locally and there is no upload of the audio to a transcription service in the reviewed code.

Browser. The app uses the browser's own recognition engine. In this mode, the app does not implement its own audio upload, but the actual processing may be local or remote depending on the browser, operating system and platform. That is why this mode should not be assumed to be 100% local on every device.

When external connections may happen

  • When the runtime or model required for offline transcription is downloaded for the first time.
  • When you use browser transcription mode on devices or browsers that depend on platform voice services.
  • When you open external links from the interface.
  • When you copy the minutes and decide to paste them into Gmail or another external service.

Export and offline use

PDF export is generated locally in the browser and sent to the browser's own print dialog. The app can work offline thanks to local storage and the service worker, but that is not the same as local encryption or automatic deletion.

Important

Because the information is stored locally in the browser or in the device profile, anyone with access to that browser or profile could see it. If you share the device, it is advisable to clear the app data when you finish.

coherence.title: Universal Coherence
coherence.body: May this work serve as gratitude and commitment: to think, feel and act in the same direction.
